name: Nexity Financial Corporation
summary: Nexity Financial Corporation, a bank holding company, provides commercial banking services. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Birmingham, Alabama. On July 21, 2011, the voluntary petition of Nexity Financial Corporation for reorganization under Chapter 11 was converted to liquidation under Chapter 7. It had filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy on July 22, 2010.
